_schema.description: Cross-session in-flight task registry for the context-engineering research project.

fields.id: Stable task id, for example T001
fields.title: Short task title
fields.context: Current state and what has already been done
fields.blocker: What is blocking progress, if any

rules: Keep only tasks that really span sessions
Do not duplicate information already stable in PROJECT_CONTEXT.md
Do not duplicate task detail already stored in plan artifacts

tasks.title: Translate research conclusions into shared Codex workflows
tasks.context: Global and project-level routing docs are in place. Research material has been organized. The first shared skill, `current-docs-sync`, now lives under `system/codex-home/skills/` and is synced to `~/.codex/skills/` for reuse in other projects. This repository now also has a project-local multi-agent configuration under `.codex/` with narrow read-only roles plus one scoped write role.
tasks.next_action: Dogfood the local multi-agent setup on a real repository task, then decide whether to extract a reusable scaffold or add a complementary verification skill.
